sections.sectionTitle: Miriam leh Aaron in Moses Phunsan

verses.text: Moses in Kush numei khat ten'pih ahih manin, ama ten'pih Kush numei' hangin Miriam leh Aaron in amah gensia-in
“ Topa in Moses' tung bek tawnin thu gen ahi hiam? Eite' tung zong tawnin hong gen hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in tua thu a za hi
Moses a lungneem mahmah hi a, leitunga om mi khempeuh sangin a lungneemzaw ahi hi
Topa in thakhatthu-in Moses leh Aaron leh Miriam kiangah, “Kikhopna bukah no mihing thumte hong pai un,” a ci hi. Amau thumte a pai uh hi
Meii khuam sungah Topa hong kumsukin, kikhopna bukkongah ding a, Aaron leh Miriam a sam hi. Amaute gel mailam nehin hong pai uh hi
Topa in, “Ka thu za un: Note' lakah kamsang a om leh Topa keimah in ama tungah maangmuhna tawh ka kilak a, amah tawh mang sungah ka kiho hi
Ka nasempa Moses tawh tua bang hilo hi; ka innsung thu khempeuh amah ki-ap hi

Amah tawh kam leh kam kiho-in, a kitello kampaute tawh hiloin, a kitel takin thu ka gen uh a, amah in Topa' meel a mu hi. Tua bang ahih ciangin bang hangin ka nasem Moses gensiat ding laulo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Amaute tungah Topa heh mahmah a, a hehsapi-in a paikhia hi
Puanbuk tung san panin meiipi a kilakkhiat ciangin Miriam phak a, vuk bangin a pak hi. Miriam' lamah Aaron kihei a, tua numei a na phak hi
Aaron in Moses kiangah, “Ka topa aw, kote hai gamtatin ka khialhna hangun gim hong pia kei in
A nu' sung panin a suahkhiat ciangin a pum phel langkhat a bei misi bangin Miriam hisak kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses in Topa' tungah, “Amah damsak in, Pasian aw, kong thum hi,” ci-in a kiko hi

Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Tua numei' maitang, a pa in cil phih leh tua numei ni sagih sung maizum ding hilo ahi hiam? Giahphual pualamah ni sagih sung kikhumcip sak in; tua khit ciangin amah hong kipaipih kik thei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin giahphual pualamah ni sagih sung Miriam kikhumcip hi. Miriam a kipaipih kik mateng khualzin a zom dingin mite dingkhialo uh hi
Tua khit ciangin Hazeroth panin mite dingkhia uh a, Paran gamlakah giahphual a sat uh hi.
